title: pharbitis bogotensis
intro: Pharbitis bogotensis, also known as the Colombian morning glory, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Convolvulaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. Pharbitis bogotensis has been found to have various health benefits, such as relieving anxiety, reducing fever, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. The plant is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
